items.title: Towards a universal cross-linking mass spectrometry approach for protein structure analysis with homo-bi-functional photo-activatable cross-linkers
items.author: Radoslaw M. Sobota
items.content: The authors report the use of homo-bi-functional photo-activatable cross-linkers for protein structural studies by cross-linking mass spectrometry. They theoretically cross-link any-to-any amino acid and serve as complementary tools to current cross-linkers.

items.title: Anterior-posterior patterning in the chaetognath Spadella cephaloptera informs bilaterian nervous system and tail evolution
items.author: Tim Wollesen
items.content: Expression of anterior patterning and Hox genes in the chaetognath Spadella cephaloptera reveals conserved features of bilaterian body patterning and offers insight into how Hox genes contributed to nervous system and tail evolution.

items.title: Ventral subicular pyramidal neurons contribute to epileptogenesis via anterior thalamic circuit
items.author: Cenglin Xu
items.content: Suppressing ventral subicular glutamatergic neurons delays epileptogenesis, primarily through glutamatergic projections to the anterior thalamic nucleus.

items.title: Behavioral and physiological responses of the aphelinid parasitoid, Encarsia formosa, to interspecific competitors
items.author: Bao-Li Qiu
items.content: The aphelinid parasitoid Encarsia formosa detects visual cues of competition from Eretmocerus hayati and hormonally adjusts its reproductive strategy, increasing egg production but reducing offspring survival as an adaptive response to competitive environments.

items.title: Distinct populations of lung capillary endothelial cells and their functional significance
items.author: Ruslan Rafikov
items.content: Single-cell RNA sequencing identified five distinct general capillary endothelial subtypes in the lung, each with distinct roles in angiogenesis, repair, regeneration, and barrier function.

items.title: Neural mechanisms of the V2M–PrL pathway mediate blue light-induced spatial memory impairment
items.author: Pingping Zhang
items.content: A V2MGlu→PrLGABA→Glu circuit underlies blue light-induced spatial memory impairment in mice.

items.title: Cyprinid Juji (Gobiocypris rarus) as a model fish to study germ cell development and gonadal differentiation
items.author: Yonghua Sun
items.content: The small cyprinid fish Juji, with a genetic sex determination system, is established as a novel model to study germ cell development and gonadal differentiation, facilitating the identification of sexually dimorphic genes prior to germ cell differentiation.

items.title: Implicit neural representations for accurate estimation of the Standard Model of white matter
items.author: Chantal M. W. Tax
items.content: In this work a self-supervised implicit neural representation framework for estimating Standard Model of white matter parameters is presented, improving fitting accuracy under noise conditions, enabling spatial upsampling, and allowing for integrated gradient non-uniformity correction.
